text: Facilities copy: large liquid spill near Section 112 concourse. Slip hazard reported. Janitorial dispatched with wet floor signs. ETA 3 mins.
Fan in wheelchair lost on Gate D ramp. Ticketing shows Section 322, but they cannot find elevator Bank 2. Need immediate golf cart escort or supervisor support.
Turnstile 3 scanner is frozen. Backup starting to form outside Gate B. Hard reboot in progress. Requesting crowd flow officer to divert incoming fans to turnstiles 4 and 5.
Concession Stand 218 reports out of bottled water. High humidity causing rapid depletion. Restock truck requested from South warehouse. Current temp 29C.
Unit 22 responding to Section 332, Row F. Minor verbal dispute between opposing fans. Sector supervisor on site trying to de-escalate. Standing by.
Medic Team 4 on-scene Section 224 Row K. Male 45y complaining of mild chest pain/dizziness. Initial assessment ongoing. Preparing wheelchair transport to Medical Station East.
Digital barcode scanner at Turnstile 1 failing to read Mexican mobile ticket apps. Backup of ~40 fans. Tech support notified. Manual ticket lookup activated.
